note: Verified SWIM-START coordinates per race, keyed by city token(s) (date-independent — a city's swim venue rarely changes year to year). Geocoded from the real swim-venue NAME via OpenStreetMap Nominatim and validated to lie within ~25 km of the event town (guards against the organizer HQ / a wrong-city match / an LLM-invented venue). NEVER the organizer's office. Robot: scripts/ingest-race-venues.mjs regenerates/extends this; only verified coordinates are written, never fabricated.
